title: nepeta podostachys subsp. podostachys
intro: Nepeta podostachys subsp. podostachys, commonly known as Catmint or Nepeta, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to Central Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Nepeta podostachys subsp. podostachys include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its antiseptic and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, Nepeta podostachys subsp. podostachys can be consumed as a tea, used in tinctures, or applied topically in the form of creams or oils to leverage its therapeutic benefits.
